titles.title: May the Lord Jesus touch you now

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Have you come here today with a heavy heart Are you worn from the weight of your load My brother, my sister this prayer is for you May the Lord Jesus touch you now

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: May He touch you now as He passes by May He meet your need, may He hear your cry If you only believe, you will surely receive May the Lord Jesus touch you now

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Are you seeking for answers you think canst be found Search no more, there is one that I know It is Jesus, He's the master and He's here even now He can touch you and make you whole
